title: Capital Markets Expertise Across Equities and Fixed Income
situation: Developed deep expertise in capital markets and private markets across equities and fixed income at two major institutional investors.
obstacle: Building genuine fluency across public and private markets—while understanding macro and microeconomic forces driving valuations—requires years of applied experience beyond surface-level product familiarity.
action: Immersed in GBM and capital markets functions, gaining hands-on experience with equity and fixed income strategies. Applied macro and microeconomic frameworks to assess how monetary policy, sector trends, and economic cycles influence asset valuations.
result: Established capital markets and private markets as a core competency, enabling credible engagement with investment teams and meaningful contribution to strategy discussions across asset classes.
